scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite" "wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env ELECTRON_DEV_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron ./dist-electron/main/index.js" "tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --watch"
scripts.build: npm run stage:backend && npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --mac --dir --publish never --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --mac --publish never --config electron-builder.yml
